textByHashes.3522600004986c22cd7c3e62000ab362c37412fd: Hiya. Are you carrying anything valuable?
textByHashes.84a4c63ebdce6967c4531d9782c938edbcb73076: Um... It's a quiz. I'm asking everyone I meet if they're carrying anything valuable.
textByHashes.99b2f3152a313d32547060de0b40ea07817878b4: Ooh, do you? It's been ages since anyone said they'd got anything worth stealing.
textByHashes.65cee89dd1b99cb08204f5e7a3614a4f0ae7cec9: Um... Not that I'd dream of stealing anything!
